reason: Replace contradictory Eritrea payroll implementations with a conservative statutory-reference contract. The server and route apply the eight monthly marginal bands in Income Tax Proclamation 62/1994 and Legal Notice 20/1995. An optional public-sector scenario separately applies the 5% employee and 7% government or state-employer pension rates in Proclamation 146/2005 without deducting pension from the employment-tax base. A conflicting hosted secondary copy shows a different five-band schedule, so the UI does not claim current 2026 rates and directs users to confirm later amendments with the competent authority.

fixtureDeltas.reason: The default annual fixture is evaluated as twelve repeated monthly cases under the eight-band statutory schedule, with no unsupported universal social contribution.
The high-income fixture now reaches the 38% top marginal band in the located primary schedule instead of the unsupported legacy model.
The zero-income baseline remains zero under the statutory marginal schedule.
